body.title: Create acurite-free standalone repo — git init, README, config template, systemd service
body.result: repo created at /home/akien/dev/src/acurite-free; pushed to github.com/akienm/acurite-free
body.intention: I intend that acurite-free exists as a publishable standalone repo that anyone can clone to replace the AcuRite app ecosystem.
body.description:
Create /home/akien/dev/src/acurite-free/ as a standalone repo (no UU dependency). Contents: acurite-capture.py, config.ini.example, README.md (setup instructions: install rtl-sdr, discover sensors, configure, sync to cloud), .gitignore, weather_monitor.service (systemd). Push to GitHub as akienm/acurite-free public repo.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/acurite-free/ (new)
**Design rules:** no UU imports; standalone Python stdlib only; no web server dependency
**Scope boundary:** IN — repo structure, README, config template, systemd unit. OUT — capture daemon logic (T-acurite-capture-daemon), web UI (T-acurite-web-ui).
**Completion criteria:** gh repo view akienm/acurite-free succeeds; README explains setup end-to-end; config.ini.example has all required fields.
